opening_hook: Luna steps into frame beside an open laptop: 'Two minutes before your next meeting? Do this with me.'
setup: She shows the timer and frames the routine as a reset, not a full workout.
escalation: Three quick standing moves build from breath to shoulders to legs.
payoff: Luna returns to the laptop calmer and more upright.
loop_or_ending: Final pose lands beside the same laptop framing so the video can loop back to the starting stress moment.

shots.visual_action: Luna enters quickly, points at the laptop clock, and makes direct eye contact.
shots.camera_or_motion: tight vertical medium shot with a slight push-in
shots.emotional_job: make the viewer feel seen immediately

shots.visual_action: She starts slow breathing with shoulder rolls beside the desk.
shots.camera_or_motion: stable medium shot with gentle subject motion

shots.visual_action: She moves through standing side reaches and quiet squats.
shots.emotional_job: show that the reset is doable

shots.visual_action: She sits back down, shoulders relaxed, and smiles at the screen.
shots.camera_or_motion: returns to the original desk angle
shots.emotional_job: land the payoff as calm readiness

continuity_requirements: Luna's outfit, hair, and apartment lighting stay consistent across shots.
The laptop remains the visual anchor for the meeting constraint.
